turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Alright, next up is the neighborhood HOA ornament complaint. I'm Laura, chairing tonight, Will filed it, and Maya owns several of the flamingos in question.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: My complaint is simple, the front yards are becoming a themed miniature golf course.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: That is extremely generous, thank you.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: I prepared a brief, with exhibits.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: He brought exhibits, for gnomes.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: Forty-two pages, mostly photos.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: We're not reading forty-two pages.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: On Maple Court alone, I counted nineteen flamingos.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Nine of those are mine, and they have names.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: That's the problem, Maya, they have names.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Phyllis is a delight.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: Phyllis is a code violation.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Sorry, can I just-

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: Sure, go ahead.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: The bylaws say tasteful, that's the whole sentence.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Right.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: And tasteful clearly excludes a plastic bird in a top hat.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Phyllis wears a sunhat, it's seasonal.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: She wore a Santa hat in July.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Christmas in July is a thing, Will.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: It is not a thing recognized by the bylaws, and frankly, this sets a dangerous-

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Will, it's a flamingo in a hat.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: To clarify, I just mean once we allow one hat, we've opened the door to costumes.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Still no.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Can I say something, because actually-

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: If I could just-

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Maya has the floor, Will.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: Thank you, last summer, three kids knocked on my door just to meet Phyllis.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: Maya, that's technically trespassing.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: That's community.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: And we still haven't addressed the pirate ship.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: The pirate ship is tabled until I have emotional support.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: Can we vote please, before I age another year.

turns.speaker: will
turns.text: I move to ban all decorative wildlife and humanoid figures under three feet.

turns.speaker: maya
turns.text: I move to make Phyllis the official mascot.

turns.speaker: laura
turns.text: I move that we adjourn and I go scream into a pillow.
